summary: Mobile PageSpeed Optimization Testing - Second Batch. All 12 tests passed (100%). Verified: 1) Google Maps NOT in index.html (removed from global load), 2) Google Maps loads dynamically only when PlacesAutocomplete component mounts, 3) Analytics (PostHog/Yandex/GA) deferred - NOT loaded immediately, load after user interaction or 4s timeout, 4) Cache-Control headers working on backend (JS/CSS/images: 1-year immutable, uploads: 30-day), 5) Booking form submission works end-to-end with Google Maps autocomplete, 6) CityTransferPage loads correctly with geocoding, 7) Mobile view (390px) renders correctly with sticky CTA, 8) Language switching works (/fr, /ru), 9) TripAdvisor widget lazy-loads on scroll.

notes.item: Google Maps loads when Home page renders (PlacesAutocomplete in booking form)
notes.impact: EXPECTED - This is correct behavior. Google Maps is NOT globally preloaded in index.html. It only loads when a page with PlacesAutocomplete component renders. Pages without PlacesAutocomplete (e.g., /countries) do NOT load Google Maps.
notes.recommendation: No action needed - this is the intended lazy-loading behavior

notes.item: Cache-Control headers from backend are overridden by Cloudflare in preview environment
notes.impact: LOW - The backend middleware correctly sets cache headers (verified via localhost:8001). In production, Cloudflare settings may need adjustment to respect origin cache headers.
notes.recommendation: Verify Cloudflare cache settings in production deployment

context_for_next_testing_agent: PageSpeed optimizations verified: 1) Google Maps removed from index.html, loads dynamically via loadGoogleMaps() in PlacesAutocomplete.js, 2) Analytics (PostHog/Yandex/GA) deferred via loadAnalytics() function - loads on user interaction (scroll/click/touch/mousemove/keydown) or 4s timeout, 3) CacheHeaderMiddleware in server.py sets proper cache headers (JS/CSS/fonts: 1-year immutable, images: 1-year immutable, uploads: 30-day). Note: Cloudflare may override cache headers in preview environment.
